title: Bachelor Brides
writer: Charles Horace Malcolm, C. Gardner Sullivan, Garrett Fort
actors: Rod La Rocque, Elinor Fair, Eulalie Jensen
plot: Percy Ashfield is to marry Mary Bowman but her father objects. He objects because while the Bowmans and Percy and others with vested interest are all assembled in Ashfield's castle admiring the pearls that are to be Mary's wedding...
